channel.title: Scroll to section from navigation header is not working
channel.description:
Hi there!
I have a problem with scroll to section, it will not scrolling to the section I clicked.
Case: I clicked on the big menu navigation, which have this [url link](https://cmc-site.vulcanca.com/services/modern-workspace#cloud-desktops), but after I clicked it, the address bar is showing the [url with slash](https://cmc-site.vulcanca.com/services/modern-workspace/#cloud-desktops) and make the scroll section is not working :/
If you want to test, the site link is [here](https://cmc-site.vulcanca.com/) Please help me, your answer is really helpful. thanks!

item.title: Scroll to section from navigation header is not working
item.dc:creator: briyadi
item.description:
Thanks for your reply.

And now it’s work! Thank you!

Read full topic
item.source: Scroll to section from navigation header is not working

item.title: Scroll to section from navigation header is not working
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @briyadi

Are you using the <Link /> component for those in-page anchor links.

If so I don’t think there’s any need to. Anchor links don’t cause a page load in the way that other links do so the SPA behaviour of your app will be unaffected if you create the anchor links in the normal way, e.g.

<a href="#cloud-desktops">Cloud Desktops</a>

Read full topic
item.source: Scroll to section from navigation header is not working

item.description:
Hi there!

I have a problem with scroll to section, it will not scrolling to the section I clicked.

Case:

If you want to test, the site link is here
